title: Boat Rental in Valencia: Costs, Seasons and What to Know in 2026
html:
Valencia offers exceptional coastal cruising from the Royal Marina Juan Carlos I, with boat hire prices typically ranging from €250 for a half-day motorboat to €1,500 for a crewed yacht. BoatHire24 is a worldwide marketplace where you can rent a boat in Valencia or list your own.

Where to set off in Valencia

Real Club Náutico de Valencia is the primary departure hub, with direct access to the Gulf of Valencia. Marina Real Juan Carlos I sits next to the City of Arts and Sciences and provides modern pontoons. Port Saplaya, a short drive north, offers a colourful base with local restaurants. Further south, El Perellonet has a small yacht club ideal for exploring the Albufera lagoon. For a longer voyage, the Isla de Tabarca lies 22 nautical miles south-east, a marine reserve with crystal-clear waters.

Do you need a licence to rent a boat in Valencia?

Yes, a valid boating licence is required for bareboat charters, but you can hire a skippered boat without one. Spanish law requires a Recreational Boating Licence (Licencia de Navegación) for motorboats over 15 hp. If you hold an ICC or equivalent, it is generally accepted. The operator will confirm exact requirements when you book. A professional skipper can be included for around €150, 300 per day.

Which boat to rent

  1. Motor yacht, Best for families and groups up to 12 people; you can review the Mefasa 90 listing for a popular 28-foot model, from €550 per half-day.
  2. Small speedboat, Agile and fun for 4, 6 guests, ideal for a quick trip to Port Saplaya, from €250 for four hours.
  3. Catamaran, Spacious and stable for up to 12 guests, perfect for a full-day cruise with a BBQ stop, from €900 per day.
  4. Sailing yacht, For a more relaxed experience, a 36-foot model sleeps 6 and is available with a skipper, from €600 per day.

How much does it cost to rent a boat in Valencia?

Prices start from €50 per person for a shared tour and go up to €2,000 for a full-day crewed yacht.

  • Shared group tour (2, 3 hours): €50, 80 per person
  • Small motorboat (half-day, no skipper): €250, 400
  • Catamaran (full-day, with skipper): €900, 1,500
  • Luxury crewed motor yacht (full-day, up to 12 guests): €1,500, 2,500

To compare verified boat listings and find the best deal, look at boat rental Valencia options on BoatHire24, where owners list directly.

When is the best time to rent a boat in Valencia?

The peak season runs from June to September, when temperatures average 28°C and the sea is calm. The prevailing wind is the leveche, which can bring warm south-easterlies. Spring and autumn offer milder conditions and fewer crowds, with prices 20, 30% lower. In July and August, book at least two weeks ahead.

For a quieter experience, aim for mid-September: the water is still warm, the marina slips are easier, and the local paella festivals are in full swing.

At a glance

  • Price range: €50, 2,500 per trip
  • Peak months: June to September
  • Typical trip length: 4 hours to full day
  • Maximum guests: 12 on most licenced vessels
  • Currency: EUR

Questions about boat rental in Valencia

Can I rent a boat overnight in Valencia?

Yes, several catamarans and sailing yachts offer overnight stays, typically from €200 per person including meals and skipper.

What is included in the rental price?

Most listings include the boat, fuel for a standard trip, safety equipment and insurance; skippered charters also include the crew.

Is it safe to sail from Valencia?

Yes, the coastline is well-charted and marinas are fully equipped, but always check weather forecasts and avoid the area when the lebeche wind is strong.

Can I bring my own food and drink?

Yes, most operators allow you to bring your own provisions; some charge a small corkage fee for glass bottles.

If you own a boat in Valencia, you can earn extra income by listing on BoatHire24. The platform connects you with thousands of travellers seeking a unique day on the water. List your boat and start receiving bookings for the 2026 season.

Written by the BoatHire24 team, who book and list verified boats in Valencia and hundreds of destinations worldwide.
